title: Intellia Therapeutics Inc (NTLA) Stock Forecast & Price Target
text: Stock analysis for Intellia Therapeutics shows that in 2025, the company's revenue was $67.67 million, an increase of 16.92% compared to the previous year's $57.88 million, while losses were $412.69 million, 20.49% less than in 2024. NTLA's stock price decreased by 62.17% in 2024 and went down by 28.81% in 2025. Recent bullish movement in NTLA stock was linked to the lifting of the clinical hold on the MAGNITUDE-2 study, enabling expanded enrollment and updated safety protocols. The company posted strong Q4 2025 earnings and revenue, surpassing expectations, with analysts at Chardan Capital reiterating a Buy rating with a target price of $26. The 18 analysts that cover Intellia Therapeutics stock have a consensus rating of Buy and an average price target of $30.33, which forecasts a 64.30% increase in the stock price over the next year.
